name: Adrenaline Rampage
description:
Choose characters and skills to rush through the space city, kill ugly BOSSes, and survive.

Key Features:
- Combination of survivor and platformer genres
- Procedural level generation
- Unbridled progression in core gameplay
- Each character has a unique set of weapons and skills
- Weapons can usually be upgraded to a super-powerful evolution
- A hub with functionality that needs to be opened for energy. You get energy for killing techno-zombies.
